dsl_rule.translation_notes: Pattern described as short black candlestick (bearish candle with negative body) at turning point of short-term retracement within uptrend. Entry uses black candle detection (body < 0 and close < open). Exit uses reversal confirmation above short-term moving average. Hold period set to 10 days per source text. Overall rank of 66/103 suggests moderate performance; stop-loss set to conservative 2% given limited author guidance.

source_rule_text: Short Black Candlestick: A reversal pattern that appears at the turning point of a short-term retracement within an uptrend
